title: tectaria hederifolia
intro: Tectaria hederifolia, also known as the fern ally or the net-veined fern, is a species of plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Tectaria hederifolia typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
